heading: Juvenile anti-drug and anti-gang grants in federally assisted low-income housing
label: 12531 Juvenile anti-drug and anti-gang grants in federally assisted low-income housing
text: Grants authorized in this Act to reduce or prevent juvenile drug and gang-related activity in “public housing” may be used for such purposes in federally assisted, low-income housing.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , , known as the Violent Crime Control and Law Enforcement Act of 1994. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title of 1994 Act note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 103–322108 Stat. 1796section 10101 of this titleSept. 13, 1994
